name: cloudstride || percy jackson
description:
Forgetting something?

going on a quest.

platonic (for now)

summary:

Percy and you have started to get to know each other after glancing at each other over the years at camp. Then he started to take you on quests with him. But now this was different. See — the weather patterns started to change for both mortals and gods. Aether’s maze.

The maze was once powered by the heartbeat of an immortal sky-creature, bound inside for eternity. That heartbeat is slowing — if it stops, the maze will collapse, releasing whatever was imprisoned inside... and possibly tearing the upper atmosphere apart.

What will you do brave heroes?

author’s message

o em gee i finally thought about a quest for this but next time i’m gonna do a prophecy based so it’s more canon based. I HOPE YOU ENJOY YAYYY! (but i lowkey think zeus kids should rise up for this since it’s a sky based quest)

key locations:

  • A floating temple balanced on a single lightning bolt.

  • The “Fog Gardens,” where cloud nymphs grow plants made of vapor and rain.

  • A frozen thunderhead containing a memory of the Titanomachy — and clues to the prisoner’s identity.
creator: wylaaaxx
